title: Atoz Diecast Construction Vehicle Set, Transporter Truck with Moving Parts, Includes Helicopter and Construction Vehicles
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes a large transporter truck with trailer, two construction vehicles, and a helicopter, all featuring moving parts for enhanced play value
REALISTIC DESIGN: Die-cast metal construction vehicles in striking orange colour scheme with detailed cabin interiors and functional moving parts
TRANSPORTER FEATURES: Large articulated lorry with detailed graphics and a spacious trailer perfect for hauling the construction vehicles
VEHICLE VARIETY: Set includes multiple construction vehicles with moving parts such as lifting arms and adjustable buckets
PLAY VALUE: Perfect for imaginative construction site play scenarios, suitable for collectors and young vehicle enthusiasts alike
description: Product Description Bring the excitement of a construction site to life with this comprehensive diecast vehicle playset! The set features a impressive orange transporter truck with trailer, complete with realistic 'Construction' graphics and moving parts. The collection includes multiple construction vehicles like rugged front loaders with articulating buckets, plus a vibrant orange and blue rescue helicopter to oversee operations from above. Each vehicle is crafted with quality diecast metal construction, ensuring durability for extended play value. The detailed wheels roll smoothly, and the moving parts allow children to mimic real construction site activities. Perfect for imaginative play, this set helps develop hand-eye coordination and storytelling skills while providing hours of entertainment. The transporter truck can carry the construction vehicles, making it ideal for storage and transport between play sessions. This versatile set combines the thrill of construction vehicles with the added excitement of aerial rescue operations, making it an excellent choice for young vehicle enthusiasts. Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
